description: Creates Okta network zones for trusted IPs, OFAC geo-blocking, high-risk country blocking, and Tor/anonymizer blocking. Configures ThreatInsight to block suspicious IPs with trusted networks exempted.

risk_profile_effects.standard: Trusted zone and OFAC blocklist always created. High-risk country blocking and Tor blocking disabled.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: All zones created. High-risk country blocking and Tor blocking enabled. Geo mode is blocklist (specific countries blocked).
risk_profile_effects.strict: All zones created. Geo mode flips to allowlist — only explicitly approved countries can authenticate.

risk_profile.client_description: Your organization's security tier. Controls which geo-blocking zones are created and whether Tor blocking is enabled.

trusted_cidrs.client_description: Your office IP addresses and VPN exit points. Used to relax MFA for on-premises users and restrict admin/service account access.

ofac_countries.client_description: Countries under OFAC sanctions. Authentication from these countries is blocked. Current list: North Korea, Iran, Cuba, Syria.

enable_high_risk_blocking.client_description: Block authentication from high-risk countries. Enabled automatically for Elevated and Strict profiles. Set to true to enable for Standard.

high_risk_countries.client_description: Countries considered high-risk. Blocked when enable_high_risk_blocking is true. Defaults to Russia, China, Belarus, Venezuela, Myanmar.

geo_mode.client_description: Standard and Elevated block specific countries. Strict mode flips to allowlist-only — only countries you explicitly approve are allowed.

allowlist_countries.client_description: Countries to allow when running in strict (allowlist) mode. Only used when geo_mode is allowlist. Provide ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes.

enable_tor_blocking.client_description: Block Tor exit nodes and anonymous proxy services. Enabled automatically for Elevated and Strict profiles. Prevents evasion of geo-blocking controls.

geo_exception_ofac_group_id.client_description: Two exception groups allow specific users to authenticate from blocked countries. OFAC exceptions require documented business justification and quarterly review.

geo_exception_non_ofac_group_id.client_description: Group for users exempt from non-OFAC geo-blocking (e.g., traveling employees). Time-bound membership recommended. Wired from the groups module.

threat_insight_action.client_description: How Okta ThreatInsight responds to suspicious IPs. 'block' prevents sign-in attempts. 'audit' logs them but allows. 'none' disables ThreatInsight entirely.

outputs.trusted_zone_id: Network zone ID for trusted CIDRs — wired to sign-on policy rules
outputs.high_risk_zone_id: High-risk country blocklist zone ID (null if disabled)
outputs.tor_zone_id: Tor/anonymizer blocklist zone ID (null if disabled)
